'''pogagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:kth|kth]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kth|kth]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pogagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pogagithi|pogagithi]] || [[word:pogagiji|pogagiji]] || [[word:pogagishi|pogagishi]] || [[word:pogagiki|pogagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pogaguthuthu|pogaguthuthu]] || [[word:pogagujuju|pogagujuju]] || [[word:pogagushushu|pogagushushu]] || [[word:pogagukuku|pogagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pogaguthu|pogaguthu]] || [[word:pogaguju|pogaguju]] || [[word:pogagushu|pogagushu]] || [[word:pogaguku|pogaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pogagufthuf|pogagufthuf]] || [[word:pogagufjuf|pogagufjuf]] || [[word:pogagufshuf|pogagufshuf]] || [[word:pogagufkuf|pogagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pogagethe|pogagethe]] || [[word:pogageje|pogageje]] || [[word:pogageshe|pogageshe]] || [[word:pogageke|pogageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pogagothotho|pogagothotho]] || [[word:pogagojojo|pogagojojo]] || [[word:pogagoshosho|pogagoshosho]] || [[word:pogagokoko|pogagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pogagotho|pogagotho]] || [[word:pogagojo|pogagojo]] || [[word:pogagosho|pogagosho]] || [[word:pogagoko|pogagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pogagofthof|pogagofthof]] || [[word:pogagofjof|pogagofjof]] || [[word:pogagofshof|pogagofshof]] || [[word:pogagofkof|pogagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:pogagĂŻfthĂŻf|pogagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:pogagĂŻfjĂŻf|pogagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:pogagĂŻfshĂŻf|pogagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:pogagĂŻfkĂŻf|pogagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:pogagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|pogagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:pogagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|pogagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:pogagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|pogagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:pogagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|pogagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:pogagĂŻfthĂŻf|pogagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:pogagĂŻfjĂŻf|pogagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:pogagĂŻfshĂŻf|pogagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:pogagĂŻfkĂŻf|pogagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:pogagĂŻfthĂŻf|pogagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:pogagĂŻfjĂŻf|pogagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:pogagĂŻfshĂŻf|pogagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:pogagĂŻfkĂŻf|pogagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pogagĂŠthĂŠ|pogagĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:pogagĂŠjĂŠ|pogagĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:pogagĂŠshĂŠ|pogagĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:pogagĂŠkĂŠ|pogagĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pogagathatha|pogagathatha]] || [[word:pogagajaja|pogagajaja]] || [[word:pogagashasha|pogagashasha]] || [[word:pogagakaka|pogagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pogagatha|pogagatha]] || [[word:pogagaja|pogagaja]] || [[word:pogagasha|pogagasha]] || [[word:pogagaka|pogagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pogagafthaf|pogagafthaf]] || [[word:pogagafjaf|pogagafjaf]] || [[word:pogagafshaf|pogagafshaf]] || [[word:pogagafkaf|pogagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:pogagasha|pogagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:pogagshĂ«asha|pogagshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pogagroasha|pogagroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pogagmuasha|pogagmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:pogagyaasha|pogagyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopogagnkshĂ«asha|gopogagnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopogagnkroasha|gopogagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopogagnkmuasha|gopogagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopogagnkyaasha|gopogagnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:pogagagasha|pogagagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pogagagshĂ«asha|pogagagshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pogagagroasha|pogagagroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pogagagmuasha|pogagagmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pogagagyaasha|pogagagyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopogagagnkshĂ«asha|gopogagagnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopogagagnkroasha|gopogagagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopogagagnkmuasha|gopogagagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopogagagnkyaasha|gopogagagnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pegĂŠgasha|pegĂŠgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pegĂŠgshĂ«asha|pegĂŠgshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pegĂŠgroasha|pegĂŠgroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pegĂŠgmuasha|pegĂŠgmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pegĂŠgyaasha|pegĂŠgyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopegĂŠgnkshĂ«asha|gopegĂŠgnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopegĂŠgnkroasha|gopegĂŠgnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopegĂŠgnkmuasha|gopegĂŠgnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopegĂŠgnkyaasha|gopegĂŠgnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:pogfagasha|pogfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pogfagshĂ«asha|pogfagshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pogfagroasha|pogfagroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pogfagmuasha|pogfagmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pogfagyaasha|pogfagyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopogfagnkshĂ«asha|gopogfagnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopogfagnkroasha|gopogfagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopogfagnkmuasha|gopogfagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopogfagnkyaasha|gopogfagnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
